summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Altınay Alyans digital catalog system. Backend APIs are fully functional with minor validation issues. Frontend flipbook, catalog tabs, and admin interface are working correctly with one overlay issue affecting sound toggle.

minor_bugs.issue: Accepts empty model codes when should return 422 validation error
minor_bugs.impact: Low - allows creation of products with empty model codes

ui_bugs.issue: Emergent badge overlay blocks sound toggle button clicks
ui_bugs.workaround: Sound toggle exists but is blocked by overlay element

passed_tests: Backend API root endpoint responds correctly
Catalog endpoints return proper data (TNY, AS, ULT)
Image upload to GridFS works correctly
Image retrieval from GridFS works correctly
Product CRUD operations work (create, read, update, delete)
Model code auto-assigns catalog correctly (TNY/AS/ULT prefixes)
Error handling for non-existent resources works
Flipbook page loads with react-pageflip animation
Catalog tabs switch between TNY, AS, ULT correctly
Product pages display with karat selectors and width sliders
Admin page loads with product table
Product form has all required fields (model code, colors, gram data)
Navigation between catalog and admin pages works

success_percentage.backend: 95% - All major APIs working, minor validation issue
success_percentage.frontend: 90% - All major features working, sound toggle blocked by overlay

action_item_for_main_agent: Fix sound toggle overlay issue - Emergent badge is blocking the sound toggle button. Consider adjusting z-index or positioning of sound toggle to be above overlay elements.
